1.premise: Baby funerals expose absurd contradictions in normal funeral customs.
A baby funeral can be judged by infant attendance like popularity.

2.premise: Baby talk cannot serve as a respectful funeral voice.

1.premise: Taken literally, 'What year is it?' can signal disorientation instead of criticism.

lines.text: I had to go to a baby funeral, and I'll make it silly.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I don't know why I thought I was going to see other babies at the funeral.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I guess this wasn't one of the popular ones.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's the only funeral where you can't talk to the coffin
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with the same voice that you talked to the person
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You can't just go up like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you mind if I say a few words?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: A lady got mad at me recently for saying the word retarded.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This woman's like, "You're saying the R word?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "Huh, this retard doesn't even know
lines.label: setup
